footer.tagline: Built by a Founder, for the community.

home.title: FOUNDERBACON
home.subtitle: SAVE THE WORLD
home.heroDescription:
The first free, open REST API for Fortnite: Save the World.
Every weapon, every stat, every perk — all in one place.
home.featureWeaponSubtitle: Every item that exists in Save the World.
home.featureWeaponDesc: Weapons, heroes, traps, survivors — everything indexed with full stats, crafting recipes, tier upgrades, and perk slots. From Common to Mythic, nothing is missing.
home.featurePerkDesc: Pick your weapon, select your tier, choose every perk slot. See the impact on DPS, crit chance, and element in real time. When you're done, export your build as a shareable image.
home.featureApiDesc: A clean, documented REST API with no auth required for public endpoints. Fetch any weapon, search by category, filter by rarity or element. Build bots, dashboards, companion apps — whatever you need.
home.showcaseSubtitle: A single request. All the data you need.
home.arsenalSubtitle: Thousands of weapons with complete stats, perks, and crafting data.

faq.a: A free, open REST API that indexes every weapon, trap, hero, and item from Fortnite: Save the World with complete stats, perks, and crafting data.
Yes. No API key required for public endpoints, no rate limit for reasonable use, free forever. Built by a Founder, for the community.

faq.q: Where does the data come from?
faq.a: Directly from the game files. Every stat, perk description, crafting recipe, and tier upgrade is extracted and structured automatically.

faq.q: How often is the data updated?
faq.a: The database syncs after every game update. New weapons, balance changes, and perk adjustments are reflected within hours.

faq.q: Can I use it for my bot / app / website?
faq.a: Absolutely. The API is designed for developers. Build Discord bots, companion apps, dashboards — whatever you need.

home.suggestSubtitle: FounderBacon is community-driven. If you have a feature request, a bug report, or just want to say hi, reach out.
home.ctaFinalSubtitle: Built by a Founder, for the community.
home.companion: Your companion to Fortnite Save the World weapons and perks and beyond
